fields.title: Consider fullscreen dashboard and hotkey parity for Autoresearch
fields.description: Follow-up UX task after the core Autoresearch port is stable. Evaluate whether tau still needs the pi-autoresearch-style expanded or fullscreen dashboard and keyboard shortcut parity beyond the compact status or widget UI shipped in v1.
fields.design: Keep this out of the core port. Revisit only after the Effect-native service, sandbox execution boundary, and git outcome handling are complete and stable. If implemented, build it on top of pure view data from the service rather than embedding business logic in UI handlers.
